rollback_policy.description: A local release is refused if its phase rank is older than release-history.json latest_version or if its key_id is not trusted.

releases.notes: Rollback protection, key-id trust metadata, and advisory update check.
Phase 8 local-only recovery snapshots, checksum sidecars, safe archive verification, recovery drill, and human restore plans.

releases.summary: First-run activation guide, seven-day onboarding path, and activation readiness checker.
Public Launch Pack assets and launch readiness checker for safe no-PHI sharing.
Cohort / Instructor Mode assets and readiness checker for safe no-PHI, non-certifying facilitation.
EDENA Evidence Trail assets and readiness checker for no-PHI evidence of learning without certification claims.
NIN Community Contribution Flow assets and readiness checker for sanitized, human-reviewed contributions without endorsement or clinical claims.
Institutional Pilot Pack assets and readiness checker for non-clinical small-group adoption without deployment, endorsement, compliance, or certification claims.
EDENA Micro-Credential Readiness Pack for formative human review without certification, badges, clinical-readiness, competency, or automatic scoring claims.
NAIO Agent Registry Pack for human-reviewed learning listings without endorsement, procurement, deployment, clinical-readiness, or automatic listing claims.
Florence-X Orchestration Preview Pack for dry-run multi-agent coordination with shared intent/context cards, Orange-deferred shared memory, and no autonomous runtime claims.

Governance Board / Steward Council Pack for advisory human stewardship without legal, compliance, institutional, clinical, procurement, certification, credentialing, disciplinary, or automatic approval authority.
Partner / Sponsor Briefing Pack for informational no-PHI collaboration conversations without solicitation, funding, approval, procurement, endorsement, or clinical-deployment claims.

Institutional Stewardship Operating Model Pack for advisory cadence without legal, compliance, procurement, budget, contracting, staffing, clinical-deployment, credentialing, certification, or automatic implementation authority.

Localization / International Readiness Lane Pack for adaptation readiness without legal, regulatory, compliance, official translation, licensure, immigration, clinical, local approval, or automatic localization claims.

Adoption & Outcomes Ledger Pack for safe adoption signals, learning evidence, time-saved estimates, human-gate patterns, friction, and cohort/institutional signal briefs without clinical, financial, staffing, compliance, certification, performance-evaluation, or automatic reporting claims.

Commercial Activation Pack for Founding Steward Cohort applications and pilot conversations without PHI, clinical decisions, certification, procurement/deployment approval, payment automation, or automatic outreach/reporting claims.
Patch release for SOUL Quiz v2 role-constellation schema, fail-closed import validation, and explicit validator dependency gating without expanding authority or autonomy.

doctrine: Agents propose. Humans judge. Nurses steward.
